news.headline: Kuwait desalination plant, oil refinery hit by missile and drone strikes
news.summary: Meanwhile in UAE, 12 people were injured by debris fall and Oracle and Amazon Web Services data centres were hit.

news.headline: Tiger Woods told police after car crash he was ‘talking to the president’
news.summary: Police body camera video shows how golfer appeared to be astonished as he was handcuffed for failing sobriety test.

news.headline: Hegseth ousts US Army chief of staff
news.summary: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has asked General Randy George to step down as chief of staff of the US Army, an official said Thursday.
